title: Sitemap XML, Index Traversal, Location Rules, and Admission · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: A preserved TypeScript crawl trace contains one plausible scope, URL, robots, Fetch, stream, Cheerio, selector, frontier, Promise, browser, axe, report, security, or shutdown defect; identify the first invalid transition before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded sitemap discovery ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence def…
objectives: Validate sitemap and sitemap-index namespaces, UTF-8 XML, escaping, location count, size, and required loc values.
Bound index depth, files, URLs, bytes, redirects, duplicate entries, duration, and cycles before traversal.
Resolve and admit sitemap and page locations through authorization, origin, robots, URL, and SSRF policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Sitemap Format
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug TypeScript team handles case 5093 during a multilingual archive markup migration. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to admit bounded sitemap XML and index graphs through host, scope, hint, and provenance policy; browser TypeScript remains deterministic and free of Node, network, filesystem, browser, and host effects; then change one duplicate, accessibility state, axe result, resource budget, browser readiness, or manual-review condition without overclaiming. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Sitemap Provenance
steps.instruction:
